title: epipactis africana
intro: Epipactis africana, also known as the African helleborine, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epipactis africana include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as wound healing and skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Epipactis africana can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
